home.subgreeting: Activity from your boards and communities.
home.officialGuideBody: Step-by-step documentation guide for 2026 industrial workers.

samplePost.p1: Has anyone had trouble with the new safety certification in Ansan?
samplePost.p2: Looking for a translation of the latest dorm regulations. My boss gave us a paper but it's only in Korean.
samplePost.p3: Any recommended clinics in Pyeongtaek that are open on Sundays for workers?

auth.signinSubtitle: Welcome back, your community is waiting.
auth.userIdHelper: Your ID is found in your onboarding documents.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Start your journey safely and anonymously. Your privacy is our priority.
signup.nicknameHelper: Use a nickname. Do not use your real name for anonymity.
signup.languageHelper: Posts are auto-translated from your language.
signup.agreement: By joining, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy focusing on worker protection.

compose.title: New Post
compose.subtitle: Write freely in your language. Posts are auto-translated for readers in other languages.
compose.anonymousNotice: Posted anonymously. Only your nickname is shown.
